name: zrok
description: zrok v2 tunnel agent — exposes a local HTTP service through a public zrok URL with a persistent name. This integration stores only the one-time environment enable token; tools[] is intentionally empty because consumers drive the local zrok2 agent rather than calling a REST API.

credential_fields.name: enable_token
credential_fields.label: Environment enable token
credential_fields.description: One-time zrok environment enable token from the zrok web console. A consumer uses it to run zrok2 enable in isolated persistent storage; it is not sent as an HTTP API key.
